mapper.select:
SELECT m.member_id, m.nickname, m.my_team_code, t.name_kr AS myTeamName, -- 직관 일기(diaries) 기준으로 총 직관 횟수 계산 COUNT(d.diary_id) AS totalGames,
-- 승부 예측(diaries 스코어) 적중 여부를 기준으로 승/패 집계 (무승부 없음) SUM(CASE WHEN d.pred_score_home = g.score_home AND d.pred_score_away = g.score_away THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS winGames, SUM(CASE WHEN d.pred_score_home IS NOT NULL AND (d.pred_score_home != g.score_home OR d.pred_score_away != g.score_away) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS loseGames, 0 AS drawGames
FROM diaries d JOIN members m ON d.member_id = m.member_id JOIN games g ON d.game_id = g.game_id LEFT JOIN teams t ON m.my_team_code = t.team_code WHERE d.status = 'COMPLETED' AND d.is_verified = 1 AND g.status = 'FINISHED' AND g.game_type IN ('REGULAR', 'POST', 'EXHIBITION') GROUP BY m.member_id ORDER BY winGames DESC, totalGames DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT member_id) FROM access_logs WHERE login_date = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT member_id) FROM access_logs WHERE login_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)

SELECT IFNULL( (SUM(CASE WHEN d.pred_score_home = g.score_home AND d.pred_score_away = g.score_away THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN d.pred_score_home IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) , 0) AS avgWinRate FROM diaries d INNER JOIN games g ON d.game_id = g.game_id WHERE d.is_verified = 1 AND g.status = 'FINISHED' AND d.status = 'COMPLETED' AND g.game_type IN ('REGULAR', 'POST', 'EXHIBITION')

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(d.diary_id) / NULLIF(#{mau}, 0), 0) AS avgMonthlyDiaries FROM diaries d INNER JOIN games g ON d.game_id = g.game_id WHERE d.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AND d.status = 'COMPLETED' AND g.status != 'CANCELLED'
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(login_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as logDate, COUNT(member_id) as cnt FROM access_logs WHERE login_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY login_date ORDER BY login_date ASC
